title: Prion Infection Outbreak: Eternal
description: Adds a bunch of infected and items. Based on IRL prion disease/vCJD/mad cow disease.
body:
## Current Content:
1. Infected: cannibal (infected human), sotona (cow and human mutant)
2. Mechanics: infection; if an infected entity kills another entity it becomes a cannibal
3. Items: infected meat; meat dropped when infected are killed; as it is infected with prions it will poison the eater when eaten.
4. Loot: (starting from lowest rarity and ascending):
>     Cannibal; infected meat, gunpowder, leather, paper
>     Sotona; infected meat, gunpowder, leather, bone
